title: claude-runner.md: add 'Resuming a run' section (re-entry, stale state, worktree reconciliation, base branch)
description:
Spec: docs/design/execution-model-v2-epic-chaining-and-learning-loop.md §3 ('Resumable orchestration', 'Stale state recovery', 'Base branch persistence'). File: skills/ticks/references/claude-runner.md only. Runs after the meta-work-ticks tick (same file); read that new content first and keep terminology consistent.

Add a 'Resuming a run' section covering:

1. Re-entry is just re-invoking the skill. Start from tk next / tk graph as usual; because meta-work is ticks, every result maps to exactly one action. Include the action map as a small table: action:implement -> dispatch implementer; action:plan -> flesh out the epic (roadmap guidance); final-review tick -> review the diff; close-out tick -> retro + plan next epic; nothing + all closed -> roadmap end, write completion report.
2. Stale state recovery, run BEFORE the first wave on (re)entry:
   - tk list --status in_progress --all now shows a last-activity age per tick (from the activity log). A tick in_progress with no live agent and meaningful age is stale: reset it with tk update <id> --status open. Completed work stays closed; only incomplete work reopens.
   - Edge case (from phase 2): an in_progress CHILDLESS epic maps to action:implement, which is unroutable — reset it to open so it correctly surfaces as action:plan.
3. Worktree branch reconciliation: list leftover worktree-agent-* branches; for each, if its tick is closed or its agent reported DONE before the session died, merge it; otherwise delete it (the work re-runs from the reopened tick). Never leave orphaned branches unaccounted for.
4. Base branch: at run start, record the run's base branch as a note on the epic tick (tk note <epic-id> 'base-branch: <name>'), asked once if ambiguous. Merges, final-review diffs (git diff <base>...HEAD), and resume read it from the epic's notes instead of assuming main. Mention the existing 'don't run on main' rule stays.

Also update the 'Current limitations' section: the 'Session-bound' limitation should be rewritten to reflect that runs now resume from tick state (in-flight agents still don't survive, but the procedure above recovers cleanly).

Do NOT touch SKILL.md or tick-patterns.md.
acceptance_criteria: claude-runner.md has the Resuming a run section with action map, stale-reset procedure incl. the childless-epic edge, worktree reconciliation, and base-branch note convention; Current limitations updated
